creator: scorpio@drkshdw.org
text:
qmailanalog cannot retrieve distfiles

Fix: 

MAINTAINER=    nbm@FreeBSD.org--O8zwdsmky2c7eeDSHl7LOY8w4SafUwLEtsDR3SkZRu4PgH5Q
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile    Tue Jan 16 12:31:24 2001
+++ Makefile.new        Mon May 21 06:29:35 2001
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 PORTNAME=      qmailanalog
 PORTVERSION=   0.70
 CATEGORIES=    mail
-MASTER_SITES=  ftp://ftp.qmail.org/pub/software/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://cr.yp.to/software/
How-To-Repeat: 		cd /usr/ports/mail/qmailanalog && make
